testcase.name: test_get_valid_products

failure.message: AssertionError: No valid products found for testing assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quick_reorder_phase_c5_v206.py:187: in test_get_valid_products assert len(valid_products) > 0, "No valid products found for testing" E AssertionError: No valid products found for testing E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_admin_discount_requests_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should have requests assert ('requests' in {'items': [{'admin_note': '', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:26:21.072014+00:00', 'customer_email': 'uitest@example.com', 'customer_name': 'UI Test Customer', ...}, {'admin_note': '', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:24:57.385443+00:00', 'customer_email': '', 'customer_name': 'TEST_Customer_Margin', ...}, {'admin_note': '', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:24:57.239498+00:00', 'customer_email': 'test.fields@example.com', 'customer_name': 'TEST_Customer_Fields', ...}, {'admin_note': '', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:24:57.119758+00:00', 'customer_email': 'test.large@example.com', 'customer_name': 'TEST_Customer_Large_Discount', ...}, {'admin_note': '', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:24:55.421604+00:00', 'customer_email': 'test.order@example.com', 'customer_name': 'TEST_Customer_Order', ...}, {'admin_note': 'Discount too high for this order', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:24:55.301932+00:00', 'customer_email': 'test.fixed@example.com', 'customer_name': 'TEST_Customer_Fixed', ...}, ...], 'kpis': {'approved': 2, 'pending': 5, 'rejected': 2, 'total': 9}, 'test.order@example.com', 'customer_name': 'TEST_Customer_Order', ...}, {'admin_note': 'Discount too high for this order', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T13:24:55.301932+00:00', 'customer_email':
